heading: Supplement, not supplant
label: 6691 Supplement, not supplant
text: Funds made available under this subchapter shall be used to supplement, and not supplant, non-Federal funds that would otherwise be used for activities authorized under this subchapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6691, , as added , , , authorized appropriations for subpart 1 of part C of former subchapter II of this chapter, prior to repeal by , title II, § 2002, , , 1913, effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs.Pub.
